name: Domain Hijacking Detected
description: A potential domain hijacking attempt has been detected, requiring an immediate and critical response.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the hijacking detection.

parameters.name: domain_name
parameters.description: The name of the domain suspected of being hijacked.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The reported status of the domain (e.g., 'hijacked').

parameters.name: old_nameservers
parameters.description: The previous nameservers of the domain, if available.

parameters.name: new_nameservers
parameters.description: The new nameservers of the domain after the change, if available.

parameters.name: registrant_email
parameters.description: The email of the domain registrant, if available.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The IP address from which the activity was detected, if available.

parameters.name: activity
parameters.description: The specific activity detected (e.g., nameserver change, registrar change).
